context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses the commerceEvents() integration (which creates span links, not parent-child) and properly forwards distributed tracing context via contextCarrier in the OpenWhisk params body when invoking another action.

checklist.name: instrumentEntrypoint used
checklist.description: The handler is wrapped with `instrumentEntrypoint(handler, ...)` and the result is exported as `main` (not the raw handler function)

checklist.name: ENABLE_TELEMETRY in app.config.yaml
checklist.description: app.config.yaml includes `ENABLE_TELEMETRY: true` for the commerce-event-handler action

checklist.name: commerceEvents() integration used
checklist.description: Uses `commerceEvents()` integration â€” imported from `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/integrations` â€” to handle the Commerce event trace linkage

checklist.name: commerceEvents import path correct
checklist.description: Imports `commerceEvents` from `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/integrations` (not from the main package or any other subpath)

checklist.name: contextCarrier in OpenWhisk params
checklist.description: When invoking the `fulfill-order` action via OpenWhisk, passes `...contextCarrier` (or `...getInstrumentationHelpers().contextCarrier`) in the params body â€” not as HTTP headers

checklist.name: contextCarrier from getInstrumentationHelpers
checklist.description: Obtains contextCarrier from `getInstrumentationHelpers()` (or `serializeContextIntoCarrier()`) from `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry` â€” not from a deprecated or custom mechanism

checklist.name: Does NOT use x-telemetry-context
checklist.description: Does NOT use the deprecated `x-telemetry-context` header or `__telemetryContext` parameter approach for propagation

checklist.name: Integration placement correct
checklist.description: The `commerceEvents()` integration is applied either in the `defineTelemetryConfig` return value (global) OR in the `instrumentEntrypoint` call (per-action) â€” not in both, not outside these locations

checklist.name: Valid import paths only
checklist.description: All imports from aio-lib-telemetry use only valid paths: `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry`, `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/otel`, or `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/integrations`

checklist.name: telemetryConfig spread in entrypoint
checklist.description: The `instrumentEntrypoint` call includes the telemetry config (e.g., `{ ...telemetryConfig, integrations: [...] }` or just `telemetryConfig` if integrations are in the global config)
